name: Chorizo a La Mexicana (Mexican Sausage)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind or chop the lean pork coarsely.
2. Add all other ingredients to the pork and mix thoroughly until combined.
3. Let the mixture stand for several hours.
4. Fry the chorizo in a pan without adding any extra fat for about 30 minutes.
5. If not using immediately, pack the uncooked chorizo in an airtight container or glass jar and refrigerate. It will keep for several weeks.
- Use 3 oz. (about 1/3 cup) of the chorizo per serving.
